esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.server.memory_allocated IS NOT NULL
    AND envoy.server.memory_heap_size IS NOT NULL
    AND envoy.server.memory_heap_size > 0
// Ratio of allocated to heap — sustained high values indicate pressure or leak
| EVAL mem_ratio = envoy.server.memory_allocated / envoy.server.memory_heap_size
| STATS max_ratio = MAX(mem_ratio)
// Adjust threshold (0.9 = 90%) based on your memory headroom expectations
| WHERE max_ratio > 0.9
